for _, row in merged.iterrows():

for cell in src_ws[1]:
    cell.font = Font(bold=True)
tbl = Table(displayName=\"SourceTable\",
            ref=f\"A1:{get_column_letter(len(col_names))}{len(merged)+1}\")
tbl.tableStyleInfo = TableStyleInfo(name=\"TableStyleMedium9\", showRowStripes=True)
src_ws.add_table(tbl)

n_data_rows = len(merged)
n_cols = len(col_names)
src_ref = f\"A1:{get_column_letter(n_cols)}{n_data_rows + 1}\"

# ── Helper: build a CacheDefinition ──────────────────────────────────────────
def build_cache(df, src_ws_title, src_ref):
    ws_src = WorksheetSource(ref=src_ref, sheet=src_ws_title)
    cache_src = CacheSource(type=\"worksheet\", worksheetSource=ws_src)
    cols = list(df.columns)
    cache_fields = []
    for col in cols:
        series = df[col]
        if series.dtype == object or col == 'Quarter':
            unique_vals = sorted([v for v in series.dropna().unique()], key=str)
            items = SharedItems(_fields=[Text(v=str(v)) for v in unique_vals],
                                containsString=True, containsNumber=False)
        else:
            unique_vals = sorted([v for v in series.dropna().unique()])
            items = SharedItems(_fields=[Number(v=float(v)) for v in unique_vals[:500]],
                                containsString=False, containsNumber=True)
        cache_fields.append(CacheField(name=col, sharedItems=items))
    return CacheDefinition(cacheSource=cache_src, cacheFields=cache_fields)

# ── Helper: add pivot sheet ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
def add_pivot(wb, sheet_name, df, src_ws, src_ref,
              row_col, val_col, agg, col_col=None):
    ws = wb.create_sheet(sheet_name)
    cols = list(df.columns)
    row_idx = cols.index(row_col)
    val_idx = cols.index(val_col)

    cache = build_cache(df, src_ws.title, src_ref)

    pivot_fields = []
    for i, col in enumerate(cols):
        if i == row_idx:
            pf = PivotField(axis=\"axisRow\", showAll=False, compact=False, outline=False)
        elif col_col and col == col_col:
            pf = PivotField(axis=\"axisCol\", showAll=False, compact=False, outline=False)
        else:
            pf = PivotField(showAll=False, compact=False, outline=False)
        pivot_fields.append(pf)

    row_fields = [RowColField(x=row_idx)]
    col_fields = []
    if col_col:
        col_idx = cols.index(col_col)
        col_fields = [RowColField(x=col_idx)]

    data_fields = [DataField(
        name=f\"{agg.capitalize()} of {val_col}\",
        fld=val_idx,
        subtotal=agg
    )]

    location = Location(ref=\"A3\", firstHeaderRow=1, firstDataRow=2, firstDataCol=1)

    pt = TableDefinition(
        name=f\"PivotTable{len(wb.worksheets)}\",
        cacheId=0,
        location=location,
        pivotFields=pivot_fields,
        rowFields=row_fields,
        colFields=col_fields,
        dataFields=data_fields,
        rowGrandTotals=True,
        colGrandTotals=True,
        compact=False,
        outline=False,
        compactData=False,
    )
    pt.cache = cache
    ws.add_pivot(pt)
    return ws

# ── Create pivot sheets ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
add_pivot(wb, \"Population by State\", merged, src_ws, src_ref,
          row_col=\"STATE\", val_col=\"POPULATION_2023\", agg=\"sum\")

add_pivot(wb, \"Earners by State\", merged, src_ws, src_ref,
          row_col=\"STATE\", val_col=\"EARNERS\", agg=\"sum\")

add_pivot(wb, \"Regions by State\", merged, src_ws, src_ref,
          row_col=\"STATE\", val_col=\"SA2_CODE\", agg=\"count\")

add_pivot(wb, \"State Income Quartile\", merged, src_ws, src_ref,
          row_col=\"STATE\", val_col=\"EARNERS\", agg=\"sum\", col_col=\"Quarter\")

# ── Save ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
wb.save('/root/demographic_analysis.xlsx')
print(\"Saved /root/demographic_analysis.xlsx\")

/bin/bash -lc "python3 -c \"
from openpyxl import load_workbook
wb = load_workbook('/root/demographic_analysis.xlsx')

# Test pivot row/col/agg for each sheet
PIVOT_SHEETS = [
    ('Population by State', 'sum', None),
    ('Earners by State', 'sum', None),
    ('Regions by State', 'count', None),
    ('State Income Quartile', 'sum', 'quarter'),
]

for sheet_name, expected_agg, col_field in PIVOT_SHEETS:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    pivot = ws._pivots[0]
    cache = pivot.cache
    field_names = [f.name for f in cache.cacheFields]
    
    row_field = field_names[pivot.rowFields[0].x] if pivot.rowFields else None
    data_field = pivot.dataFields[0]
    col_f = field_names[pivot.colFields[0].x] if pivot.colFields else None
    
    row_ok = row_field and 'state' in row_field.lower()
    agg_ok = data_field.subtotal == expected_agg
    col_ok = (col_field is None) or (col_f and col_field in col_f.lower())
    
    print(f'{sheet_name}: row={row_field}({row_ok}), agg={data_field.subtotal}({agg_ok}), col={col_f}({col_ok})')

# Test SourceData
src = wb['SourceData']
headers = [str(h).strip().lower() if h else '' for h in next(src.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=1, values_only=True))]
print(f'\\nSourceData headers: {headers}')
print(f'Row count: {src.max_row - 1}')

# Check Quarter values
rows = list(src.iter_rows(values_only=True))
hdr = [str(h).strip() for h in rows[0]]
quarter_idx = hdr.index('Quarter')
quarters = set(r[quarter_idx] for r in rows[1:] if r[quarter_idx] is not None)
print(f'Quarter values: {quarters}')

# Check Total
total_idx = hdr.index('Total')
earners_idx = hdr.index('EARNERS')
median_idx = hdr.index('MEDIAN_INCOME')
sample = [(r[earners_idx], r[median_idx], r[total_idx]) for r in rows[1:5]]
print(f'Sample Total check (earners * median = total): {sample}')
\""
